title: Capstone: The Lesson That Went Sideways

noah_g5_fractions.opening_line: I think I messed up the example. I used the bigger number because it looked bigger, but now everyone is staring at me.
noah_g5_fractions.win_line: Oh, I see it now, I had the idea backwards!

deshawn_offtask.opening_line: (leans back and starts joking with the side table) This is taking forever.

marcus_volatile.opening_line: (pushes the paper away) I already said I don't get it. I'm done.

priya_quiet.opening_line: (quietly has a useful idea written down, but keeps her hand low while louder students talk)
priya_quiet.win_line: Yes! I had that, thanks for asking me.

story_hook: The lesson has gone sideways; the teacher must recover order, care, and reasoning across several students at once.
